title: catalog-update-action configuration
description: Configuration for the catalog-update-action GitHub Action

$schema.description: Path or URL to the JSON schema

maxOpenPrs.description: Maximum number of open PRs at any time

packageManager.description: Package manager used for lockfile updates

minReleaseAgeDays.description: Minimum number of days a release must be published before creating a PR. Helps prevent supply chain attacks by quarantining new releases. Set to 0 to disable (default). Does not apply to vulnerability audit overrides.

groups.description: Dependency grouping rules. Evaluated in order — first match wins.

name.description: Group identifier, used in branch names and PR titles

patterns.description: Glob patterns to match package names (* wildcard supported)

updateTypes.description: Restrict to specific semver change types. Omit to match all types.

ignore.description: Rules to ignore specific dependency updates

pattern.description: Glob pattern to match package names

updateTypes.description: Only ignore specific change types. Omit to ignore all updates for matched packages.

audit.description: Configuration for transitive dependency vulnerability overrides via bun audit

enabled.description: Enable automated overrides for vulnerable transitive dependencies

minimumSeverity.description: Minimum severity level to create overrides for
